subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! Two letters have been received from thee and
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز مغناطيس تأييد ملکوت‌ الله ثبوت بر عهد و پيمان است و ما عدای آن کلام هذيان
subcodes.subjects: @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant
